items.title: Deduplicate retrieved chunks
items.scenario: A RAG retriever can return the same passage from multiple queries; you want each chunk in the prompt once.
items.explanation: Track seen ids in a `set`; skip a chunk if `chunk.id in seen`.

items.title: Stopword filter
items.scenario: Strip common, low-signal words before tokenizing or building a bag-of-words index.
items.explanation: `STOPWORDS = {'the','a','of',...}` — O(1) checks beat scanning a list each time.

items.title: Allowed-tools policy
items.scenario: A session may only call a subset of tools; the agent proposes some and you must restrict to what's permitted.
items.explanation: `final = requested & allowed` does the intersection in one expression.

items.title: Visited nodes during graph traversal
items.scenario: BFS/DFS over a knowledge graph or chunk graph must avoid revisiting nodes.
items.explanation: `visited = set()` then `if node in visited: continue` keeps the traversal both correct and linear.
